name: Compiler MPI Matrix
summary: Check compiler, MPI wrapper, and module compatibility before building HPC codes.
description: This skill gathers read-only evidence about loaded modules, compiler paths, MPI wrapper commands, and optional MPI smoke compilation so users can avoid mismatched compiler and MPI stacks.

inputs.name: executable
inputs.description: Optional executable or shared library to inspect with ldd.

inputs.name: compile_smoke
inputs.description: Opt-in flag to compile the included MPI hello-world smoke source.

outputs.name: compiler_mpi_report
outputs.description: Report of compiler commands, MPI wrappers, module state, and selected environment variables.

outputs.name: mpi_smoke_binary
outputs.description: Optional user-owned binary compiled from the included MPI smoke source.

examples.title: Collect compiler and MPI wrapper report

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Run the report after loading a compiler/MPI module pair and review wrapper commands for consistency.
